name: conversation-usage-meter
description: Show Codex token, speed, elapsed time, and quota metrics in an overlay or on demand.

interface.shortDescription: Show token usage and quota metrics in an overlay or on demand.
interface.longDescription: Conversation Usage Meter reads local Codex session token_count events and formats concise localized usage metrics with latest-turn tokens, output tokens per second, elapsed time, and compact remaining rate-limit percentages and reset times when available. It keeps the MCP query tool and starts a local transparent overlay from a SessionStart hook. The overlay intentionally omits conversation-total token counts because Codex does not expose a consistently reliable selected-thread signal in every desktop build. It hides automatically when Codex is not the foreground window, and the plugin does not use Stop-hook insertion because Codex surfaces Stop continuation prompts in the transcript.
defaultPrompt: Show the latest Codex usage footer.
Explain my latest token and quota metrics.
